methodology: Cross-tool OSINT correlation engine — orchestrates assess_mep_influence, detect_voting_anomalies, early_warning_system, analyze_coalition_dynamics. Correlation thresholds: influence ≥ 70 (sensitivity: MEDIUM). Data source: European Parliament Open Data Portal (data.europarl.europa.eu).
